name: Vinaigrette (Russian Cooked Vegetable Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 large Beet, without skin, stemmed  OR
16 oz Beets, drained and cut into
3 medium Dill Pickles, cut into 1/2-inch dice
8 1/2 oz Peas, drained, from a can
1/3 cup Sunflower Oil or Corn Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the beet.
If using a fresh beet, preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Wrap the beet in aluminum foil and bake until tender,
about 1 ¼ hours. When cool enough to handle, peel it
and cut into half-inch dice.
2. Meanwhile, cook potatoes in lightly salted boiling water for 10 minutes.
Add carrots and cook until vegetables are tender but not mushy,
about 10 more minutes. Let cool, then cut all vegetables into
half-inch dice.
3. In a large salad bowl, combine potatoes, carrots, onion, pickles,
peas, beet, scallions, and dill. Season with salt and pepper.
Gently toss to avoid crushing the vegetables.
4. In a small bowl, whisk dry mustard, sugar, and vinegar together.
Whisk in oil and season with salt and pepper.
5. Toss salad with dressing, tasting as needed to correct seasoning.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Makes 4 generous servings.
